checklist.description: Downstream repository metadata and workflows can be queried.
checklist.recommendation: Confirm token scope and repository visibility before onboarding.

checklist.description: At least one workflow references the upstream compare-vi action.
checklist.recommendation: Add a workflow lane that consumes the certified compare-vi action ref.

checklist.description: The downstream workflow pins a certified immutable ref (stable tag or commit SHA).
checklist.recommendation: Pin to a stable semver tag or immutable commit SHA from the upstream release train.

checklist.description: A workflow run succeeds while consuming the pinned compare-vi action ref.
checklist.recommendation: Run/repair the consumer workflow until at least one successful execution is recorded.

checklist.description: A protected production environment exists for human-gated promotions.
checklist.recommendation: Create a production environment and configure required reviewers.

checklist.description: Branch protection advertises expected policy checks for queue-managed branches.
checklist.recommendation: Align branch protection required checks with platform policy guard and promotion contract.
